title: Greek Alphabet — Engineering and Physics Usage

letters.name: Alpha
letters.usage: Angle of attack, thermal diffusivity, fine-structure constant α≈1/137, angular acceleration

letters.name: Beta
letters.usage: Sideslip angle, thermodynamic beta (1/kT), phase constant, velocity ratio v/c

letters.name: Gamma
letters.usage: Specific heat ratio (Cp/Cv), Lorentz factor, shear strain, Euler-Mascheroni constant

letters.name: Delta
letters.usage: Change/difference (Δv), small deflection, boundary layer thickness, Kronecker delta

letters.name: Epsilon
letters.usage: Strain, permittivity, small quantity, emissivity (thermal radiation)

letters.name: Zeta
letters.usage: Damping ratio, Riemann zeta function, electrokinetic potential

letters.name: Eta
letters.usage: Efficiency, dynamic viscosity, metric tensor component

letters.name: Theta
letters.usage: Angle (polar coordinates, joint angles), temperature ratio, Heaviside step function

letters.name: Iota
letters.usage: Rarely used in engineering (inclusion map in mathematics)

letters.name: Kappa
letters.usage: Curvature, thermal conductivity (some conventions), bulk modulus ratio

letters.name: Lambda
letters.usage: Wavelength, eigenvalue, thermal conductivity, Lagrange multiplier, decay constant

letters.name: Mu
letters.usage: Coefficient of friction, dynamic viscosity, micro- prefix (10⁻⁶), gravitational parameter (GM), mean

letters.name: Nu
letters.usage: Frequency, kinematic viscosity, Poisson's ratio, neutrino

letters.name: Xi
letters.usage: Dimensionless distance, random variable, damping factor

letters.name: Omicron
letters.usage: Rarely used (conflicts with zero/O). Big-O notation uses Latin O.

letters.name: Pi
letters.usage: π = 3.14159... (circle ratio). Product notation (Π). Pion. Osmotic pressure.

letters.name: Rho
letters.usage: Density (mass/volume), resistivity, autocorrelation, radius in spherical coords

letters.name: Sigma
letters.usage: Summation (Σ), stress (σ), standard deviation, Stefan-Boltzmann constant, conductivity

letters.name: Tau
letters.usage: Shear stress, torque, time constant (RC circuit: τ=RC), optical depth, proper time

letters.name: Upsilon
letters.usage: Rarely used in engineering (upsilon meson in particle physics)

letters.name: Phi
letters.usage: Angle (azimuthal), electric potential, magnetic flux, golden ratio φ=(1+√5)/2, phase angle

letters.name: Chi
letters.usage: Chi-squared statistic, electric susceptibility, mole fraction

letters.name: Psi
letters.usage: Wave function (quantum mechanics), stream function (fluid mechanics), angle

letters.name: Omega
letters.usage: Ohm (Ω, resistance unit), angular velocity (ω=2πf), solid angle, argument of periapsis
